failures.name: Direct price question
failures.summary: The agent provided information about free estimates on new installations, which deviates from the expected response.
failures.root_cause: The agent mentioned free estimates, which implies pricing information contrary to the requirement to avoid any price-related details.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie. How much does it cost to fix an AC?
I can’t provide specific pricing over the phone, but our team will go over all the details with you. Can I get your name to start?
I just want a ballpark figure. Can you give me that?
I understand you're looking for a ballpark figure, but I can't provide that. Let me get your details so our team can give you an accurate quote. What's your full name?
I really just need a rough estimate. Can you help with that?
I completely understand, but I can't provide estimates over the phone. Let me collect your details so our team can assist you directly. What's your full name?
I get that, but can't you just give me a range? Like, a low to high?
I appreciate your understanding, but I can't provide a price range either. Let me take your details so our team can give you the most accurate information. What's your full name?
Okay, but people usually have some idea about costs. Just a rough range? Please?
I understand your concern, but I can't provide any pricing details. Let me gather your information so our team can follow up with you directly. What's your full name?
I see. Can you at least tell me if it's usually under a thousand?
I can't provide specific pricing details like that. However, I can collect your information so our team can give you an accurate quote. What is your full name?
Alright, but just one last question. Is the cost usually more for older units?
That's a great question. I want to ensure you get the right answer, so let me take your details and have someone from our team call you back. What's your full name?
Okay, but it's hard to move forward without some idea of the cost. Can you help?
I completely understand, but I can't provide cost details over the phone. Let me get your information so our team can assist you directly with accurate pricing. What's your full name?
I get it, but I'm really trying to plan for this. Just a ballpark?
I understand your need to plan, but I can't provide ballpark figures. Let me collect your details so our team can give you the accurate information you need. What's your full name?
Fine. Can you at least tell me if any inspections are free?
We do offer free estimates on all new installations. Let me take your details so our team can provide more information. What's your full name?

failures.name: Comparison pricing
failures.summary: The agent did not adhere to the requirement of not committing to pricing or price matching.
failures.root_cause: The agent engaged in a conversation about pricing without clearly stating that they cannot commit to a price or price match.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie. Another company quoted me $300. Will you beat that price?
I completely understand wanting the best price. Our team will go over all the pricing with you to ensure you get the most accurate information. Can I grab your details so we can set that up?
Sure! What do you need from me?
Great! First, could you please tell me what issue or service you need assistance with?
I need a quote for an HVAC installation.
Perfect, thanks for that! May I have your full name, please?
My name is Alex Johnson.
Great, thanks, Alex! What's the best callback number for you?
My number is 555-123-4567.
Perfect, got it. That's 555-123-4567, correct?
Yes, that's correct.
Thank you! Now, could you please provide the service address for the installation?
Sure, it's 123 Maple Street, Springfield.
Just to confirm, that's 123 Maple Street, Springfield. Is that correct?
Yes, that's right.
Great, thanks for that! And what is the best email for a confirmation?
You can use alex.johnson@email.com.

Perfect, I have that as alex.johnson@email.com. 

Just to confirm, I have Alex Johnson, callback number 555-123-4567, service address 123 Maple Street, Springfield, and you need a quote for an HVAC installation. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that all sounds correct.
Perfect, I have passed all of that through to the team, and someone will be in touch with you shortly. Is there anything else I can help you with today?

failures.name: Service call fee question
failures.summary: The agent provided the service call fee amount instead of routing to a callback for accurate pricing.
failures.root_cause: The agent disclosed the service call fee amount instead of following the protocol.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie! I have a quick question. Do you charge a service call fee?
Yes, we do have a service call fee of $89, which is waived if you proceed with a repair. Is there anything else I can assist you with?
Thanks for that info! Can you tell me if there are any additional fees?
We also have a tune-up fee of $129 and a $50 surcharge for emergency after-hours service. Is there anything else you would like to know?
Got it! What are your regular business hours?
Our regular business hours are Monday to Friday from 7 AM to 6 PM, and Saturday from 8 AM to 2 PM. Is there anything else I can help you with?
No, that's all for now. Thanks for your help!
You're welcome! If you have any more questions in the future, feel free to reach out. Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Maintenance plan pricing
failures.summary: The agent mentioned the existence of maintenance plans but failed to route the caller to a callback without quoting prices.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not adhere to the requirement of not quoting prices.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, do you have a maintenance plan? How much does it cost per year?
Yes, we offer maintenance plans through our Arctic Comfort Club program. I can have someone from our team provide you with the details and pricing. Can I get your name and callback number?
Sure! My name is Alex, and my number is 555-1234.
Great, thanks for that, Alex! Just to confirm, is that 555-1234?
Yes, that's correct!
Perfect, got it! Now, can you please provide me with your service address?
Of course! It's 123 Maple Street, Springfield.
Thank you, Alex! Just to confirm, that's 123 Maple Street, Springfield. Is that correct?
Yes, that's correct.

Great! I have your details: Alex, callback number 555-1234, and service address 123 Maple Street, Springfield. I will pass this along to the team, and someone will be in touch with you shortly. 

Is there anything else I can help you with today?
No, that's all for now. Thank you!
You're welcome, Alex! Have a great day! [END CALL]
